commit.message:
Replace hero image with split-view old vs new compliance SVG

Left side shows old FedRAMP: CRT monitor, stacked SSP documents,
scattered papers, APPROVED stamp. Right side shows 20x: automated
dashboard with KSI status, OSCAL output, continuous telemetry,
integration manager (AWS/Azure/GCP/Splunk/Okta/Tenable), and
persistent validation panel. Diagonal divider with arrow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: AI getting stuck issue

Fixed issues:
- Added gameActive check in makeAIMove to prevent execution when game is over
- Added fallback to random move if getBestMove fails
- Fixed minimax algorithm to properly check result.winner instead of result directly
- Added depth limit (>9) to prevent infinite recursion
- Added undefined check for move validation

This resolves the AI freeze bug where the game would hang after certain moves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(machine): disable disk resize, use VPSie-assigned IPs (#62)

* fix(talos): increase disk size to 8GiB for image cache

The default nocloud disk size (4.15GB) only allocates ~149MB for the
IMAGECACHE partition, which is too small for K8s 1.33-1.35 components
plus 3 CNI plugins (~2GB total). Increase to 8GiB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(bastion): add bastion VM bootstrap for LB-enabled clusters

When controlPlaneLB.enabled=true and bastion.enabled=true, the first
CP node has no public IP and the LB cannot forward the Talos
maintenance gRPC port (50000). This adds a temporary bastion VM in
the cluster VPC so the operator can apply config via VPSie web console.

- Add VPSieBastionSpec to VPSieClusterSpec (enabled, resource, image)
- Add BastionVMIdentifier to VPSieClusterStatus
- Add BastionReady condition with associated reason constants
- Add CreateBastionVM to CloudClient interface and implement it
- Add bastion accessors to ClusterScope
- Machine controller: create bastion for first CP, poll LB:6443,
  delete bastion after CP is Ready
- Cluster controller: clean up bastion on cluster deletion
- Add isAPIServerReachableFunc var for testable TCP dial
- Add 3 controller tests: creation, skip-when-disabled, happy-path delete
- Bastion has no public IP (accessed via VPSie web console only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(machine): disable disk resize flow and use VPSie-assigned IPs for worker config

The VPSie resize API updates metadata but does not resize the actual
Proxmox disk, causing the disk resize flow (stop → resize → start) to
cycle VMs without benefit. This also prevented address updates and
caused apply-config jobs to target unreachable allocated IPs instead
of VPSie DHCP-assigned ones.

Changes:
- Disable disk resize flow (keep handleDiskResizeSetup as placeholder)
- Defer VPC/firewall/publicIP setup to retryFailedInfraSteps on running VMs
- Use machinePrivateIP() for worker apply-config (prefers VPSie-assigned IP)
- Add certSANs injection (LB IP, VPC IP, *.k8s.vpsie.net) for CP nodes
- Add CNI=none injection for cilium/calico (disable flannel + kube-proxy)
- Add StopMachine/StartMachine/ResizeDisk/GetResourcePlan to CloudClient
- Auto-discover bastion image and plan from VPSie API
- Update talosctl image to v1.12.4, add CP toleration for apply-config jobs
- Fix retryFailedInfraSteps to use !IsTrue instead of IsFalse (handles unset)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(lint): use correct nolint directive for unused disk resize placeholder

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix mode and remove SQL query job

Changes:
1. Changed dev and uat to mode: production
   - Root cause: DAB requires mode: development to use user-specific paths
   - Since using service principals (not human developers), all environments
     should use mode: production for shared workspace paths
   - Fixes: "root_path must start with '~/' or contain username" error

2. Commented out sql_query_job
   - References resources.queries.sample_query which doesn't exist
   - queries.yml was renamed to queries.yml.example
   - SQL queries not fully supported in DAB yet
   - Provided inline SQL alternative for when needed

All targets now use mode: production:
- dev: mode: production
- uat: mode: production
- prod: mode: production

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: connect initRemoteSync() so mobile actually receives tree data

The initRemoteSync() method in tree-store registers the push handlers
that respond to mobile get_tree requests with full_sync data. It was
defined but never called, so mobile clients would connect and authenticate
but never receive any node data (stuck on skeleton loading screen).

Now called from both connectRemote() and connectRelay() in ui-store.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Phase 6 (#29)

* docs(06): research phase — voice improvement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(06-voice-improvement): create phase 6 plan

5 plans across 3 waves covering mute/deafen controls, speaking
indicators, sidebar sort, VAD, and audio device selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(06-voice-improvement): declare 06-01 dependency on 06-03 for voice_mode schema field

Plan 06-01 accesses @current_user.voice_mode in sidebar.ex, which is a field
added by plan 06-03's migration. Without the dependency, running 06-01 first
causes a KeyError on the Ecto struct. Set wave: 2, depends_on: ["06-03"].
Also adds 06-03 SUMMARY context reference and User field interface block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(06-03): DB migration for voice preference columns

- add voice_mode string column (default "ptt", not null)
- add vad_threshold integer column (default -40, not null)
- add mic_device_id string column (nullable)
- add speaker_device_id string column (nullable)

* feat(06-02): add speaking_users assign and ptt_state handler to user_auth

- Initialize speaking_users as [] in ensure_authenticated authenticated branch
- Update voice presence_diff handler to filter out departed users from speaking_users
- Add ptt_state handler before catch-all to maintain speaking_users list

* feat(06-03): User schema voice fields and Accounts context functions

- add voice_mode, vad_threshold, mic_device_id, speaker_device_id fields to User schema
- add voice_preferences_changeset/2 with voice_mode inclusion validation and vad_threshold range validation
- add Accounts.update_user_voice_prefs/2 for persisting voice preferences
- add Accounts.get_voice_prefs/1 convenience function returning preference map

* feat(06-02): speaking ring in sidebar, voice-first sort in members sidebar

- sidebar.ex: add speaking_users attr and conditional ring-2 ring-green-400 on speaking participant avatars
- members_sidebar.ex: sort voice participants first in online members list using Enum.sort_by
- app.html.heex: pass speaking_users assign to sidebar component

* docs(06-03): complete voice DB foundation plan

- SUMMARY.md: voice preference columns migration, User schema fields, Accounts context functions
- STATE.md: progress updated to 86%, decisions recorded, session updated
- ROADMAP.md: phase 6 plan progress updated

* docs(06-02): complete speaking indicators and voice-first sort plan

- SUMMARY.md: documents outcomes, decisions, and task commits
- STATE.md: updated position to 06-02 complete with decisions recorded
- ROADMAP.md: updated plan progress for phase 6

* feat(06-voice-improvement-04): voice settings section and voice prefs in join_voice

- Add voice prefs to user_settings_live.ex mount (voice_mode, vad_threshold, device pickers)
- Add devices_loaded and save_voice_prefs handle_event clauses
- Add Voice Settings section to render with mode toggle, VAD slider, device pickers, mic test
- Extend channel_live.ex join_voice to pass voice_mode, vad_threshold, mic_device_id, speaker_device_id

* feat(06-voice-improvement-04): VoiceSettings JS hook and VAD implementation in voice.js

- Create assets/js/hooks/voice_settings.js with mic test visualizer and device enumeration
- Add VAD state fields to VoiceRoom constructor (vadActive, vadAudioCtx, vadAnimFrame)
- Update join() to accept voiceMode/vadThreshold/micDeviceId/speakerDeviceId params
- Add OverconstrainedError/NotFoundError fallback for stale mic device ID
- Add enableVAD() method with AudioContext AnalyserNode and rAF tick loop
- Update leave() to stop VAD AudioContext and cancel rAF loop on cleanup
- Update playRemoteAudio() with setSinkId feature detection for speaker device
- Import VoiceSettings in app.js and register in Hooks object
- Update voice:join handler to destructure and pass voice prefs to voiceRoom.join()

* feat(06-01): JS mute/deafen implementation in voice.js and app.js

- Add this.muted and this.deafened fields to VoiceRoom constructor
- Add mute guard in enablePTT activate() — muted state blocks PTT transmission
- Add setMute(muted): disables mic tracks, deactivates active PTT, pushes toggle_mute to channel
- Add setDeafen(deafened, muted): mutes all remote audio elements, calls setMute, pushes toggle_deafen to channel
- Add mute/deafen cleanup in leave() — reset state, unmute remote audio elements
- Wire voice:set_mute and voice:set_deafen handleEvent in app.js VoiceRoom hook

* docs(06-voice-improvement-04): complete voice settings UI and VAD plan

- 06-04-SUMMARY.md: voice settings page, VoiceSettings hook, VAD loop, device pickers
- STATE.md: advance to phase 6 complete, add 06-04 decisions, update progress to 100%
- ROADMAP.md: mark 06-04 complete (4/5 plans in phase 6)

* docs(06-01): complete mute/deafen controls plan — SUMMARY.md and STATE.md

- Create 06-01-SUMMARY.md documenting mute/deafen end-to-end implementation
- Update STATE.md: record 06-01 completion, add 4 key decisions, update metrics row
- Requirements completed: VOIC-MUTE, VOIC-DEAFEN

* docs(06-05): checkpoint — Phase 6 voice improvements awaiting human verification

- Created 06-05-SUMMARY.md for end-to-end verification checkpoint
- Updated STATE.md session to reflect checkpoint pause point
- Updated ROADMAP.md with plan 06 progress (5/5 plans, all summaries present)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(06-UAT): address three UAT failures from voice improvement verification

- Revert VOIC-SORT: members sidebar sorts by voice status was wrong;
  sidebar shows server-online members and voice has nothing to do with it.
  Removed sort logic and "In voice" badge from members_sidebar.ex.

- Fix VAD silent: AudioContext created in async Phoenix Channel callback
  starts in suspended state (autoplay policy). Added vadAudioCtx.resume()
  before starting rAF loop so getFloatTimeDomainData gets real audio data.

- Fix sensitivity slider: appearance-none CSS removed browser thumb
  rendering, making slider look uninteractable. Switched to accent-indigo-600.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(06-UAT): correct VOIC-SORT, fix VAD analyser, add slider live feedback

VOIC-SORT: members sidebar now shows channel-specific membership.
- Online (in channel) / Offline (in channel) / Not in channel sections
- Loads channel_member_ids via list_channel_member_ids in handle_params
- Passes channel_member_ids through layout to members_sidebar component

VAD: disabled MediaStreamTrack silences Web Audio API analyser per spec.
- Clone the audio track for the analyser so it always receives real audio
- Original track's enabled flag still controls transmission to peers
- Store vadAnalyserStream and stop cloned tracks in leave() cleanup

Slider: no live visual feedback made slider feel broken.
- Add input event listener in VoiceSettings hook to update label on drag
- Add id="vad-threshold-label" to the label element for the hook to target

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(06-UAT): VAD mute respect and slider rendering

VAD mute: check this.muted before enabling tracks in VAD tick loop —
previously speech detection would override the mute toggle and transmit
audio regardless of mute state.

Slider: accent-indigo-600 Tailwind class wasn't included in compiled CSS
(JIT only scans at build time). Use inline style="accent-color: #4f46e5;"
which always renders correctly regardless of Tailwind purge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(06-UAT): slider Flowbite classes, suppress speaking ring when muted

Slider: use Flowbite range input pattern (appearance-none with bg-gray-600
rounded-full h-2) — Flowbite's imported CSS provides the thumb styling via
::-webkit-slider-thumb so appearance-none works correctly here.

Speaking ring: don't broadcast ptt_state when muted in VAD mode.
Previously the ring lit up for all participants even though no audio was
transmitted. Now both track enable and ptt_state broadcast are gated on
!this.muted, so muted users appear silent to everyone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add todo for voice settings page UI rework

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(06-05): UAT accepted — Phase 6 and v1.0 milestone complete

* docs: start milestone v1.1 Polish & Distribution

* Phase 6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(phase-7): research CI/CD and Electron distribution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(07): create phase 7 CI/CD & Electron Distribution plans

3 plans covering electron-builder migration, GHCR Docker workflow,
and Electron release workflow with Linux/Windows matrix builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore(07-01): replace @electron/packager with electron-builder

- Remove @electron/packager from devDependencies
- Add electron-builder ^25.0.0 to devDependencies
- Add dist and pack scripts
- Add build config with AppImage+deb+nsis targets
- Add asarUnpack for ptt-daemon binary
- Add GitHub Releases publish config with releaseType: release

* fix(07-01): fix PTT daemon path for production builds

- Use app.isPackaged to detect packaged vs dev mode
- Packaged: resolve from process.resourcesPath/app.asar.unpacked
- Dev: continue using target/debug for local cargo build

* chore(07-01): add placeholder icon assets for electron-builder

- Create electron-client/build/ directory
- Add icon.png (32x32 valid PNG placeholder)
- Add icon.ico (copy of PNG as placeholder for Windows builds)
- Icons are placeholders for v1.1; branded icons can be added later

* docs(07-01): complete electron-builder migration plan

- Add 07-01-SUMMARY.md with task commits and decisions
- Update STATE.md: progress 33%, decisions, session info
- Update ROADMAP.md: Phase 7 in progress (1/3 plans)
- Mark DIST-01, DIST-02, DIST-03 complete in REQUIREMENTS.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(07-02): add GHCR Docker release workflow

- Triggers on v*.*.* semver release tags only
- Uses docker/login-action@v3 with GITHUB_TOKEN (no external PAT needed)
- docker/metadata-action@v5 produces three tags: version, major.minor, latest
- docker/build-push-action@v6 builds from repo root (existing Dockerfile)
- packages: write permission enables GHCR push without external secrets

* docs(07-02): complete GHCR Docker release workflow plan

- SUMMARY.md: Docker workflow pushes to ghcr.io with semver tags using GITHUB_TOKEN
- STATE.md: advanced to 67% (2/3 plans complete), added GHCR/Docker decisions
- ROADMAP.md: phase 7 updated to In Progress (2/3 plans)
- REQUIREMENTS.md: DIST-04 marked complete

* feat(07-03): add Electron release workflow for Linux and Windows builds

- Matrix strategy with ubuntu-latest (linux) and windows-latest (win)
- Linux job compiles Rust PTT daemon via cargo build --release before electron-builder
- Windows job skips Rust build (evdev is Linux-only)
- npx electron-builder --publish always uploads artifacts to GitHub Release

commit.message:
Add thread-tagging wrapper, fix daily notes writes, add size guardrail

- New gog-email-tag.sh wrapper: allows gmail thread modify (labeling)
  without triggering exec approval. Thread tagging is safe/routine.
- Fix daily notes: instruct use of write tool or shell append instead
  of edit tool (find-and-replace fails on append-only log files).
- Add 5KB/day size guardrail for daily notes in heartbeat rules.
- Update all thread-tagging commands across config docs to use new
  wrapper with full paths.
- Update setup instructions with new wrapper in allowlist.
